fields.description: Master kill-switch for all SA-leave automation (doc events, scheduler tasks, button handlers).
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: When a new Employee is saved on an SA company, automatically create a submitted Leave Policy Assignment.
fields.label: Auto-Assign Leave Policy on Hire

fields.description: Month of year the annual leave cycle starts (1 = January).
fields.label: Cycle Start Month

fields.description: Day of month the annual leave cycle starts.
fields.label: Cycle Start Day

fields.description: Assigned to new hires when Auto-Assign is enabled. Populated by the installer to the seeded SA Standard Leave Policy; edit to point at a tenant-specific policy if you want.
fields.label: Default Leave Policy

fields.description: BCEA s22 sick-leave cycle length in months (default 36). Cycles run as fixed consecutive blocks from the employee's first day of work — not a rolling window. Consumed by Phase 2 sick-cycle algorithm.
fields.label: Sick Cycle Length (Months)

fields.description: BCEA s22 sick-leave entitlement per fixed cycle (days).
fields.label: Sick Days Per Cycle

fields.description: Trigger weekly low-balance email when an employee's Annual Leave balance drops below this.
fields.label: Low Balance Threshold (Days)

fields.description: Cap on annual-leave days carried forward at cycle end (HR policy, not BCEA).
fields.label: Annual Leave Carry-Forward Max (Days)

fields.description: Reserved for Phase 3: requests exceeding this many days will require a second approver. Not active yet.
fields.label: Two-Step Approval Threshold (Days)

fields.description: Used when Employee.leave_approver is blank AND the employee's Department has no leave_approvers defined. The first active user holding this role receives approval emails.
fields.label: Default Approver Fallback Role

fields.description: From-address used by the leave-automation scheduler tasks. Leave blank to use the site default Email Account.
fields.label: Notification From Email
